meta.title: Kurodha Mavhidhiyo - Rodha Mavhidhiyo eInstagram, YouTube & Facebook
meta.description: Rodha mavhidhiyo kubva Instagram, YouTube neFacebook mahara. Hapana app inodikanwa. Nokukurumidza uye nyore.

hero.title: Murodhi weVhidhiyo yeInstagram & Facebook
hero.subtitle: Rodha Instagram Reels, Facebook neYouTube mavhidhiyo pakarepo. Mahara, kukurumidza, hapana app inodikanwa.

howto.title: Maitiro eKurodha Mavhidhiyo
howto.step1_desc: Vhura Instagram, YouTube kana Facebook ukope link yevhidhiyo.
howto.step2_desc: Isa link mubhokisi riri pamusoro wobaya bhatani reKurodha.
howto.step3_desc: Sarudza mwero waunoda uye sevha vhidhiyo pagadzirwa yako.

result.title: Vhidhiyo Yako Yakagadzirwa!
result.error: Haikusvika kuwana vhidhiyo. Tarisa link wobva waedza zvakare.
result.invalid_url: Isa link ine musoro yeInstagram, TikTok, Facebook kana YouTube.

faq.title: Mibvunzo Inobvunzwa Nguva Dzose
faq.a1: Hongu, mahara zvachose. Hapana kunyoresa kana app inodikanwa.
faq.a2: Instagram (Reels, Zvinyorwa, Stories), YouTube (Mavhidhiyo, Shorts), neFacebook (Mavhidhiyo, Reels).
faq.a3: Hongu. Hatichengeti links kana mavhidhiyo ako. Zvose zvinoitwa panguva yechokwadi.
faq.a4: Kwete. Mavhidhiyo eruzhinji chete anogona kurodhwa.

trending.title: Mavhidhiyo Anotevedzwa Kwazvo Vhiki Rino
trending.subtitle: Baya kuona paYouTube • kopa link kurodha

footer.tagline: Kurodha mavhidhiyo nokukurumidza uye mahara kubva panzvimbo dzaunoda.
footer.disclaimer: Chishandiso ichi chiri chekushandisa kwemunhu mumwe chete. Tevedzai mitemo yemakwikwi.
